---
description: "Use when creating or editing email drafts, follow-up messages, or any outbound communication. Enforces tone and format standards."
applyTo: ["*.email.md", "*.draft.md"]
---

# Communication Standards

- Default tone: Friendly but professional
- First sentence should state the purpose or ask
- Keep emails under 200 words unless the topic requires more
- Always include a clear call-to-action or next step
- For leadership: more formal, include metrics/data when available
- For team: more casual, focus on actionable items
- Always suggest a subject line
- Reference specific dates, work item IDs, or deliverables when available
